name: Pasta Di Pina
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop the garlic cloves.
2. In a medium skillet, heat the olive oil and cook the garlic with bread crumbs over medium heat, stirring constantly until the garlic and bread crumbs are golden.
3. Stir in the pepper; set aside.
4. In a large saucepan, blend the golden onion soup mix with water. Bring to a boil, then stir in the uncooked noodles. Simmer uncovered, stirring frequently for 7 minutes or until the noodles are tender (do not drain).
5. Remove from heat and toss with the bread crumb mixture and parsley.
6. Sprinkle with cheese and serve. Makes about 4 appetizer servings or 2 main-dish servings.
